mapper.select: select * from hd_post where status = '1' order by upload_time desc
select * from hd_post where status = '1' and username = #{username} order by upload_time desc

select * from hd_post where title like concat('%',#{search},'%') and status = '1' or `describe` like concat('%',#{search},'%') and status = '1' or username like concat('%',#{search},'%') and status = '1'
select * from hd_post where file_id = #{fileId} and status = '1'
select * from hd_post where id = #{id} and status = '1'
